title: corybas carinatus
intro: Corybas carinatus, commonly known as the helmet orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is known for its unique, helmet-shaped flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corybas carinatus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Corybas carinatus can be made into a tea or infusion by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water.
